problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
